title: Senior Artificial Intelligence Engineer
company_focus: Diversified financial services and asset management
description:
About Our Company

Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based
financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their
financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise
Financial Inc., a US financial planning company
headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and
diversified financial services leader with more than $1.5
trillion in assets under management, administration and
advisement as of year-end 2024. The firm’s focus areas
include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and
Insurance Protection.

Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards
you for your contributions, and work with other talented
individuals who share your passion for doing great work.
You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark
at the office and a difference in your community. So, if
you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong,
ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a
career at Ameriprise India LLP.

Job Description

We're seeking an exceptional Software Engineers to drive the
development of cutting-edge artificial intelligence enabled
solutions. As a key member of our Asset Management
Engineering team, you'll shape the future of investment
management by developing and deploying innovative AI
applications.

In this role you will be instrumental in:

- Engineering a technology stack to revolutionize insight
  generation through AI-powered analytics.
- Building scalable solutions to enhance investment management
  workflows, elevating the investment process and creating
  efficiencies.
- Integrating a technology stack with LLMs to support a range
  of uses, from insight generation to workflow automation.
- Accelerating the adoption of generative AI across the asset
  management value chain-distribution, investments and
  investment operations.

You will combine your technical expertise with business
acumen to:

- Develop production-grade applications integrated with LLMs
  from concept to deployment.
- Design and implement automated workflows for complex
  investment processes.
- Collaborate with global teams to deliver high-impact
  solutions.

The ideal candidate for this job should have:

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Data
  Science, Statistics, or a related field. A strong academic
  background with coursework in data structures, algorithms,
  and software development is preferred.
- Strong software engineering fundamentals with hands-on
  development experience.
- Proven ability to translate complex business requirements
  into technical solutions.
- Natural curiosity and passion for emerging technologies.
- Excellence in cross-functional collaboration and
  communication.

Responsibilities in this job include (but are not limited
to):

- Design, develop, and deploy technology solutions integrated
  with LLMs for distribution, investments and investment
  operations.
- Evaluate and implement state-of-the-art generative AI models
  and frameworks and build proof-of-concept solutions.
- Partner with stakeholders to translate business requirements
  into technical solutions and communicate complex AI
  concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
- Work cross-functionally with data engineers, technologists
  and product owners to architect scalable, production-grade
  AI systems.
- Optimize existing workflows and tools through AI automation
  while ensuring solutions meet performance, security, and
  compliance standards.
- Perform code reviews, and contribute to technical
  architecture and documentation.

Required Technical Skills:

- Advanced Python programming and experience with generative
  AI models with knowledge of prompt engineering, fine
  tuning and RAG implementation.
- Strong foundation in cloud computing, containerization, and
  proficiency with version control systems (Git) and CI/CD
  pipelines.
- Deep understanding of LLM capabilities, responsible AI
  practices, and experience with RAG architectures and
  vector databases.
- Full-stack development skills, including frontend
  development with React/JavaScript, building and
  maintaining RESTful APIs, and understanding web
  architecture and microservices.
- Experience with AWS services, cloud-native architectures,
  scalable and secure deployment patterns, and familiarity
  with monitoring and observability tools.
- Ability to handle large-scale datasets, data engineering
  principles, and knowledge of automated workflow design and
  implementation.

What we will look for in an ideal candidate:

- Engineering (B.E./ B. Tech.) graduate or Masters (Stats,
  Quant, Mathematics, etc.) from a well-recognized
  institute.
- Strong problem-solving abilities and analytical mindset
- Excellent communication skills with technical and non-
  technical stakeholders
- Demonstrated ability to work in fast-paced, agile
  environments
- Comfortable working with globally distributed teams

Preferred Additional Experience:

- Financial services or investment management background.
- Experience with web scraping and data extraction techniques.
- Open-source contributions or side development projects.

Full-Time/Part-Time

Full time

Timings

(2:00p-10:30p)

India Business Unit

AWMPO AWMP&S President's Office

Job Family Group

Technology

Ameriprise India LLP is an equal opportunity employer. We
consider all qualified applicants without regard to race,
color, religion, sex, genetic information, age, sexual
orientation, gender identity, disability, military status,
veteran status, marital status, pregnancy, family status or
any other basis prohibited by law.

We are committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible
recruitment process for individuals with disabilities. If
you require a reasonable accommodation to participate in the
application or interview process, speak to your recruiter to
discuss how we can support you.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building, deploying, and
integrating LLMs into production applications, including RAG
implementations, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and
generative AI model evaluation. The engineer is hands-on
with AI models and frameworks, not just supporting
infrastructure for others.
